hero.title: 7 Days in Kashmir.
hero.titleAccent: The Whole Valley, Slowly and in Style.
hero.intro: A full week to lose yourself in paradise. Srinagar, Gulmarg, Pahalgam and Sonamarg, with houseboat nights and time to breathe. The most complete and unhurried way to experience the Kashmir valley.
hero.heroImageAlt: Kashmir valley exclusive escape Sonamarg meadow

overview.heading: 7 Days Kashmir Exclusive Escape: The Full Picture
body: Seven days is the luxury of time in Kashmir. This exclusive escape covers all four of the valley's great destinations: Srinagar with its Dal Lake and gardens, Gulmarg with its gondola, Pahalgam with its alpine valleys, and Sonamarg, the meadow of gold, gateway to glaciers and the Himalayas.

Arranged privately from Malaysia, this 7 day Kashmir package is for travellers who want to experience the valley fully and at a relaxed pace, with houseboat nights, mountain excursions and time simply to enjoy the scenery. Your own vehicle and driver guide are with you throughout.

highlights.heading: Why Travellers from Malaysia Love This Trip

items.title: Sonamarg, the Meadow of Gold
items.body: Often missed on shorter trips, Sonamarg is a stunning meadow surrounded by glaciers and snow peaks, the gateway to the higher Himalayas and a highlight of a longer Kashmir tour.

items.title: Gulmarg & Pahalgam
items.body: The gondola at Gulmarg and the alpine valleys of Pahalgam, both included with time to savour them rather than rush.

items.title: Dal Lake Houseboat Living
items.body: Houseboat nights and shikara rides on Srinagar's Dal Lake, with the Mughal gardens and floating markets all around.

days.title: Arrive Srinagar, Houseboat
days.description: Met at Srinagar airport and transferred to your Dal Lake houseboat. Evening shikara ride.

days.title: Srinagar Sightseeing
days.description: The Mughal gardens and old city of Srinagar.

days.title: Sonamarg Excursion
days.description: A full day at the meadow of gold.

days.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
days.description: Drive to Gulmarg and overnight in the resort.

days.title: Gulmarg to Pahalgam
days.description: Scenic drive to Pahalgam and overnight.

days.title: Pahalgam to Srinagar
days.description: More of Pahalgam, then return to Srinagar.

days.title: Depart Srinagar
days.description: Checkout and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

hotelOptions.heading: Choose Your Comfort Level
hotelOptions.subheading: Centrally located hotels with easy access to the main sights. Pick the tier that suits your style.

whyBook.heading: The Whole Valley, at Leisure
whyBook.body: Seven days lets you reach Sonamarg and overnight in the resorts, experiencing Kashmir the way few visitors do. We craft the pace so the valley unfolds slowly. Dhesu has arranged Kashmir tours for many years.

points.title: MATTA & IATA Registered
points.body: Fully licensed Malaysian travel agency. We guide you through India e-Visa documentation with every booking.

points.title: Private Tours, Daily Departures
points.body: No minimum group to wait for. Your trip runs on your dates, your pace, your own vehicle and guide.

points.title: A Real Team to Call
points.body: Reachable throughout your trip. Flight delayed, your guide waits. Plans change, we adapt on the ground.

points.title: Group & Custom Pricing
points.body: Travelling as a family or group lowers the per-person cost. Ask us for a tailored quote.

sections.heading: Kashmir Exclusive Escape from Malaysia
sections.body:
This 7 day package is the most complete Kashmir tour we offer, covering all four of the valley's great destinations at a relaxed, exclusive pace.

The addition of Sonamarg, often missed on shorter trips, and overnight stays in Gulmarg and Pahalgam, mean you experience the valley far more deeply than a quick visit allows.

For travellers who want paradise without rushing, this is the ideal Kashmir itinerary.

sections.heading: Sonamarg and the Higher Himalayas
sections.body:
Sonamarg, the meadow of gold, is one of Kashmir's most beautiful spots, surrounded by glaciers and towering peaks. It is the gateway to the higher Himalayas and the start of the road to Ladakh.

A pony ride to the Thajiwas Glacier, meadow walks and the dramatic mountain scenery make it a highlight that shorter Kashmir trips simply do not have time for.

items.question: Do Malaysians need a visa for India?
items.answer: Yes. Malaysian passport holders apply for an India e-Visa online before departure. The tourist e-Visa covers tourism and short visits and is valid for 30 days from entry. The application is on the official India e-Visa portal, and Dhesu walks you through it when you book. Visa fees are not included in the package price.

items.question: Which airport does this trip use?
items.answer: This is a land-only package: hotels, transfers, tours and guide are included, but international flights are not. Most Malaysian travellers fly from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) to Sheikh ul-Alam International Airport, Srinagar (SXR). We can recommend suitable flights and timings on request.

items.question: What does the 7 day Kashmir tour include that shorter ones do not?
items.answer: The 7 day escape adds Sonamarg, the meadow of gold, and includes overnight stays in Gulmarg and Pahalgam rather than day trips. This means a deeper, more relaxed experience of the whole valley.

items.question: What is the best time to visit Kashmir?
items.answer: Each season has its appeal: spring (April to June) for tulips and gardens, summer (July to September) for lush valleys, autumn (October to November) for golden colours, and winter (December to February) for snow and skiing. Sonamarg is best from May to October.

items.question: Is this trip suitable for a relaxed holiday?
items.answer: Very. The seven-day pace and houseboat living make it ideal for travellers who want to unwind in beautiful surroundings rather than rush between sights. There is time for walks, shopping and simply enjoying the scenery.
